# Plan: Baseline Approach

## Overview
This plan takes a standard approach to the problem, balancing depth and breadth.

## Architecture
- Component A: handles input processing
- Component B: manages state
- Component C: produces output

## Implementation Steps
1. Set up project scaffolding
2. Implement core data types
3. Build processing pipeline
4. Add validation layer
5. Write tests

## Risks
- Integration complexity between components
- Performance under high load

## Timeline
Phase 1: 2 weeks (scaffolding + types)
Phase 2: 3 weeks (pipeline + validation)
Phase 3: 1 week (testing)
